<!-- Please follow the Conventional Commits style in the PR title, e.g. `feat(theme): add neon pink keyword color`. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] style — formatting / non-logic changes
- [ ] refactor — code restructuring
- [ ] perf — performance improvements
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore / ci / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate:theme` passes locally
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under a new version or under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Screenshots added if the change affects the theme visually
